key.name: poll-interval
key.description: How often to poll the Ollama API for status updates.

key.name: ollama-host
key.description: Hostname or IP of the Ollama server.

key.name: ollama-port
key.description: Port number of the Ollama server.

key.name: show-gpu-stats
key.description: Display GPU utilization and VRAM usage in the menu.

key.name: show-cpu-stats
key.description: Display CPU load in the menu.
